title: UK Counterterrorism Police Take Over Investigation Into Ann Widdecombe’s Death
summary_full: The police said new information had come to light in the murder investigation into the death of Ann Widdecombe, a right-wing former lawmaker.
summary_public: The police said new information had come to light in the murder investigation into the death of Ann Widdecombe, a right-wing former lawmaker.
